impact: The daemon can skip the blocked broad checkbox-75 work, continue the active guardrail fixture task or the next independent task, and later recover solar requirement extraction through smaller syntactic-validity and fixture-contract steps before implementation.
summary: Park the repeatedly failing broad solar requirement extraction task and add syntax-first, fixture-first recovery tasks so the daemon can make progress without reattempting invalid Python rewrites.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-75: Add requirement extraction validation for the solar permit fixture covering eligibility, plan-review applicability, upload requirements, fee/payment checkpoints, corrections, inspections, and explicit-confirmation gates.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
